data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for endpoint lifecycle controls and metadata.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding endpoint lifecycle controls and metadata. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or records confirming the existence or state of these specific controls and metadata. The linked use case mentions the need for these controls but lacks concrete evidence of their implementation or status, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of endpoint lifecycle controls and metadata being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
